body.title: D332: Memory echo filter — prevent self-parrot feedback loops
body.result: D332: Echo filter at episodic storage — checks response against recent ring, blocks when self-parrot detected. 20 contaminated 'book project greeting' memories purged from DB. Logged as MEMORY_ECHO_BLOCKED. 1880 tests pass.
body.description: Igor stores his own canned responses as EPISODIC memories. These get retrieved by semantic search and the LLM parrots them back, creating a reinforcing loop. 20 contaminated memories found and purged (book project greeting). Need: filter at memory storage that detects when narrative matches a recent Igor response and either blocks storage or flags it. This is not just a programmer blocker — it is a person blocker. Igor cannot distinguish his own output from new input.
